name: nexus-ai-code
description: Nexus AI Code is a VS Code extension and companion CLI for orchestrating multiple AI coding agents, project context, planning, debugging, review workflows, and local automation from one workspace-aware cockpit.

commands.title: Nexus: Open Latest Code Review Report

nexus.defaultProvider.description: The default CLI provider to use when routing tasks.

nexus.customProvider.command.description: Executable for the custom provider. Use {{prompt}} as a placeholder.

nexus.customProvider.args.description: Arguments for the custom provider. Use {{prompt}} in any element as a placeholder.

nexus.enablePromptEnhancement.description: Prepend workspace context to prompts before sending to the provider.

nexus.showRawOutput.description: Show unfiltered stdout/stderr alongside parsed output.

nexus.runGitStatusAfterTask.description: Run git status after each task completes and show changed files.

nexus.mcp.autoSelectPreset.description: Allow Nexus to select the best MCP preset based on task intent.

nexus.mcp.requireApprovalForHighRiskTool.description: Require approval before high-risk MCP tool calls.

nexus.mcp.maxResultChars.description: Maximum characters injected from MCP result into agent prompt.

nexus.mcp.maxRoundsPerTask.description: Maximum MCP tool-use rounds per task.

nexus.mcp.presets.microsoftLearn.enabled.description: Enable Microsoft Learn MCP preset for official Microsoft documentation.

nexus.mcp.presets.context7.enabled.description: Enable Context7 MCP preset for up-to-date library documentation.

nexus.subagents.enabled.description: Enable Nexus subagent layer (runs focused pre-agents before main agent).

nexus.subagents.maxRuns.description: Maximum number of subagents to run per task.

nexus.subagents.includeSecurity.description: Include the security review subagent when applicable.

nexus.subagents.includeDocs.description: Include the docs subagent when applicable.

nexus.subagents.mode.description: Controls how Nexus selects subagents. off: disabled. auto: selected by task intent. manual: use selectedRoles. full: broader chain within safety caps.

nexus.subagents.preset.description: Default subagent preset for auto mode.

nexus.subagents.maxParallel.description: Maximum number of subagents that may run concurrently.

nexus.subagents.hardCap.description: Absolute maximum number of subagents allowed per task, regardless of planner output.

nexus.subagents.includeReviewer.description: Allow the reviewer subagent when applicable.

nexus.subagents.includeTester.description: Allow the tester subagent when applicable.

nexus.subagents.failOpen.description: Continue to the main agent when an optional subagent fails.

nexus.subagents.injectMaxChars.description: Maximum characters from synthesized subagent results injected into the main agent prompt.

nexus.subagents.timeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for a single subagent run.

nexus.subagents.selectedRoles.description: Manual subagent roles used when nexus.subagents.mode is manual.

nexus.debug.bm25.enabled.description: Enable BM25-first local retrieval for Nexus debug mode.

nexus.debug.bm25.maxResults.description: Maximum BM25 candidate files for debug mode.

nexus.debug.react.enabled.description: Enable controlled ReAct investigation loop for debug mode.

nexus.debug.react.maxRounds.description: Maximum ReAct investigation rounds for debug mode.

nexus.debug.autoApprove.description: Allow debug mode to apply fixes without waiting for explicit approval.

nexus.debug.addRegressionTest.description: Ask debug mode to add or update regression tests when practical.

nexus.debug.rerunAfterFix.description: Run verification command after debug fix when safe.

nexus.review.defaultBaseBranch.description: Default base branch for code review.

nexus.review.defaultPreset.description: Default review preset: fast, balanced, architecture, safe, or full.

nexus.review.includeSecurity.description: Include security review in structured code review.

nexus.review.includeTests.description: Include test coverage review in structured code review.

nexus.review.includeArchitecture.description: Include architecture review in structured code review.

nexus.review.maxDiffChars.description: Maximum characters of git diff to include in review prompt.

nexus.review.maxFileContextChars.description: Maximum characters of expanded file context for review.

nexus.review.blockOnCritical.description: Treat critical findings as blocking (request-changes verdict).

nexus.review.allowAutoFix.description: Allow review mode to auto-apply fixes. Requires requireApprovalBeforeFix=false.

nexus.review.requireApprovalBeforeFix.description: Require user approval before applying any fix from a review finding.

nexus.review.outputFormat.description: Output format for code review: structured (JSON report) or markdown.

nexus.review.architectureScore.enabled.description: Enable architecture score in code review reports.

nexus.review.architectureScore.warnBelow.description: Warn when architecture score falls below this threshold.

nexus.review.architectureScore.blockBelo.description: Treat as architecture-blocker when architecture score falls below this threshold.

nexus.review.steps.reviewer.description: Run the Reviewer agent (bug & correctness) during code review.

nexus.review.steps.tester.description: Run the Test Analyst agent (test coverage) during code review.

nexus.review.steps.security.description: Run the Security agent during code review.

nexus.review.steps.architect.description: Run the Architect agent (architecture & OOP/OOD) during code review.

nexus.review.openPanelOnCompletion.description: Automatically open the Review Panel when code review completes.

nexus.review.panelColumn.description: Which editor column to open the Review Panel in.

nexus.subagents.edit.maxRuns.description: Maximum subagents for edit (Build Agent) mode.

nexus.agents.enabled.description: Enable project-level markdown agent prompts and @agent autocomplete.

nexus.agents.autoCopyDefaults.description: Copy bundled default agent prompts into .nexus/agents when missing.

nexus.skills.enabled.description: Enable project-level markdown skills and #skill autocomplete.

nexus.skills.autoCopyDefaults.description: Copy bundled default skill prompts into .nexus/skills when missing.

nexus.analytics.enabled.description: Enable analytics recording for AI coding tasks.

nexus.analytics.retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain analytics records before pruning.

nexus.analytics.costEstimationEnabled.description: Enable estimated cost computation for each task run.

nexus.analytics.storeWorkspacePath.description: Store full workspace path in analytics records (hashed workspace ID is used when disabled).

nexus.analytics.storeConversationTitle.description: Store conversation titles in analytics records.

nexus.analytics.allowExport.description: Allow exporting analytics data to JSON, CSV, or Markdown.

nexus.historySearch.enabled.description: Enable BM25 full-text search over conversation history.

nexus.historyRag.enabled.description: Automatically inject relevant history snippets as RAG context before each task.

nexus.historyRag.maxResults.description: Maximum number of history results to inject as RAG context.

nexus.historyRag.maxChars.description: Maximum characters for the RAG context block injected into the prompt.

nexus.historyRag.minScore.description: Minimum BM25 score threshold for a history result to be included in RAG context.

nexus.agentMode.requirePlanApproval.description: Require approval before Agent Mode executes file edits.

nexus.agentMode.createCheckpointBeforeEd.description: Create a checkpoint before Agent Mode edits files.

nexus.agentMode.requireApprovalBeforeTer.description: Require approval before Agent Mode runs terminal commands.

nexus.agentMode.autoRunTests.description: Automatically run detected tests after Agent Mode edits files.

nexus.agentMode.autoFixTestFailures.description: Allow Agent Mode to attempt fixing failed tests.

nexus.agentMode.maxRecoveryAttempts.description: Maximum recovery attempts after test failures.

nexus.agentMode.collectFinalDiff.description: Collect final diff summary after Agent Mode completes.

nexus.agentMode.updateDocsWhenNeeded.description: Allow Agent Mode to update documentation when implementation changes require it.

nexus.agentMode.useWorkingBranch.description: Create a working branch for Agent Mode changes.

nexus.agentMode.branchPrefix.description: Branch prefix used by Agent Mode.

nexus.agentMode.maxDiffChars.description: Maximum number of diff characters included in final Agent Mode summaries.

scripts.compile: npm run compile:extension && npm run compile:webview && npm run build:cli
